title: Quiet Fortress
lyrics: [Music] No matter which way the day came, yeah, no matter which way the night came, it's still yours for you, ho. It's just you, it's just you. Even when the night come Even when the day come It's just you, yeah it's just you Contributing us to us all Even when the night come, I still find the ways to be here Even when you all alone, even when you say hell no, I still find ways to be here DIE IN THE WOOM! ALL LIFE MENTALS, YEAH! ALL LIFE MENTALS, ALL LIFE IS PANTED AND DIE! ALL LIFE MENTALS, ALL LIFE MENTALS WHAT MENTALS IS? I didn't think it could get much Now we go on, I wanna go back to the things that told us we're stupid for loving this way we don't know Now it comes back to me and we start yet the narrator, would you boo? What's your view on that? Seems to be gone for the next four years or eight more so you should take a lot of date. Thank you, bye.

Even when the night come Even when the day come It's just you, yeah it's just you Contributing us to us all
Even when the night come, I still find the ways to be here Even when you all alone, even when you say hell no, I still find ways to be here

I didn't think it could get much

Now it comes back to me and we start yet the narrator, would you boo?
What's your view on that? Seems to be gone for the next four years or eight more so you should take a lot of date. Thank you, bye.
